title: Family Timeline
description: Order people, animals, and everyday things by age or time, from little to grown and long ago to today.
learningGoals: Practice temporal ordering with younger and older examples
Notice life stages and how living things grow
Build early long-ago/today vocabulary through pictures and speech
interactionModel: tap-tap or drag picture cards into timeline slots in order
feedbackModel: correct placements sparkle with gentle praise; mismatches wiggle, speak a warm nudge, and return for another try; completed timelines are spoken back

modes.title: Growing Up
modes.skill: ordering life stages from younger to older

modes.title: Long Ago to Today
modes.skill: ordering simple historical change over time
